statement: Harlequin Crest (Shako) is a Unique Dusk Shroud. qlvl: 82. Key mods: +2 All Skills, +1-148 to Life/Mana per character level, 10% Damage Reduced, 50% Magic Find, +2 to All Attributes. One of the most universally sought helmets in D2R.

Enigma (Jah+Ith+Ber) is a Runeword requiring 3-socket Light Armor or Body Armor. Preferred bases: Mage Plate (low Str req, 3 sockets), Archon Plate (elite stats), Dusk Shroud. Grants +1 Teleport to all classes, +0.75 Str/lvl, 45% FRW, 750-775 Defense, +2 All Skills.

Stone of Jordan is a Unique Ring. qlvl: 39. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +20 Mana, +25% Max Mana, Lightning Damage +1-12. Best farmed from Nightmare Andariel (jewelry-heavy drop table). Also used as high-value currency for activating Diablo Clone.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Arachnid Mesh is a Unique Spiderweb Sash. qlvl: 87. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +20% Faster Cast Rate, +5% Max Mana, Slows Target by 10%, Level 3 Venom when struck. The only belt offering +1 All Skills and FCR simultaneously; BiS belt for most casters.

The Oculus is a Unique Swirling Crystal (Sorceress orb). qlvl: 75. Key mods: +3 to Sorceress Skills, +20 FCR, +20 Vitality/Energy, All Resistances +20, 50% Magic Find. Pre-Spirit runeword era BiS Sorceress weapon. Good for untwinked characters.

War Traveler is a Unique Battle Boots. qlvl: 71. Key mods: 25% Faster Run/Walk, +10 Strength/Vitality, Adds 15-25 Damage, 30-50% Magic Find, Attacker Takes Damage 5-10. Best in slot boots for magic find builds due to flat +MF.

Tal Rasha's Guardianship is the Lacquered Plate of the Tal Rasha's Wrappings set. qlvl: 72. Partial set bonuses include MF. With full set: +65% Magic Find, +10 All Resistances, Cold/Fire/Lightning Absorb, +Sorceress skills.

Mara's Kaleidoscope is a Unique Amulet. qlvl: 67. Key mods: +2 to All Skills, All Resistances +20-30, +5 to All Attributes. Best-in-slot amulet for most builds wanting balanced resistances and skill levels.

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.

Griffon's Eye is a Unique Diadem. qlvl: 87. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +25% FCR, -15% to Enemy Lightning Resistance, +15-20% Lightning Skill Damage. BiS helmet for Lightning Sorceress builds due to pierce + lightning damage boost.

Thundergod's Vigor is a Unique War Belt. qlvl: 75. Key mods: +20% Lightning Resist, +15 Vitality/Strength, +1 to Lightning Fury, +1 to Fend, Adds 1-50 Lightning Damage. BiS belt for Lightning Fury Amazon builds.

Homunculus is a Unique Hierophant Trophy (Necromancer shield). qlvl: 75. Key mods: +2 to Necromancer Skills, +20% FCR, 40% Faster Block Rate, +30% Blocking, +10 Energy, All Resistances +40. BiS shield for Bone/Poison Necromancer builds.

Windforce is a Unique Hydra Bow. qlvl: 73. Key mods: +2 to Amazon Skills, Adds 15-328 Damage, 20% IAS, Knockback, +20 Strength, 6% Mana Stolen per Hit, +1 to Magic Arrows. One of the strongest bows for Amazon builds. High demand.
Chance Guards is a Unique Chain Gloves. qlvl: 22. Key mods: 25-40% Magic Find, +20% Gold Find, +15 Defense. Lowest requirement MF gloves; commonly used in budget MF builds.

Shaft Stop is a Unique Mesh Armor. qlvl: 53. Key mods: +150-180% Enhanced Defense, +30 Vitality, 20% Damage Reduction, +200% Mana Recovery after each kill, Half Freeze Duration. Popular for its 20% DR — often used in physical builds or as a budget alternative before Fortitude/Treachery.

Verdungo's Heartly Cord is a Unique Mithril Coil. qlvl: 63. Key mods: +10% FRW, +30-40 Vitality, +10-13% Damage Reduction, Replenish Life +10-13, +100-120% Enhanced Defense. BiS belt for physical damage builds needing DR and Vitality (Hammerdins, Meleedins, Fury Druids, BvC Barbs).

Titan's Revenge is a Unique Ceremonial Javelin. qlvl: 75. Key mods: +2 to Amazon Skills, +2 to Javelin and Spear Skills, 25% IAS, +150-200% Enhanced Damage, Replenishes Quantity (self-replenishing), +30 Strength/Dexterity. BiS javelin for Lightning Fury Amazon — infinite supply via replenish quantity removes need to restock.

Crown of Ages is a Unique Corona. qlvl: 82. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +50% Damage Reduction (up to 15% DR cap), All Resistances +20-30, Socketed (1-2 sockets), +30% FHR, Indestructible. Best-in-slot helm for PvP and high-end PvM due to DR + resistance + sockets for jewels.

Nightwing's Veil is a Unique Spired Helm. qlvl: 82. Key mods: +2 to All Skills, +8-15% Cold Skill Damage, -5% to Enemy Cold Resistance, +10-20 Dexterity, Half Freeze Duration, +90-120% Enhanced Defense. BiS helmet for Blizzard/Frozen Orb Sorceress and other cold builds due to cold damage bonus + pierce.

Jalal's Mane is a Unique Totemic Mask (Druid helm). qlvl: 73. Key mods: +2 to Druid Skills, +2 to Shape Shifting Skills, +20% FRW, +30% FHR, +150% Enhanced Defense, All Resistances +15-30, +5 Strength. BiS helmet for most Druid shapeshifter builds (Werewolf/Werebear); strong FHR and skills.

Death's Fathom is a Unique Dimensional Shard (Sorceress orb). qlvl: 82. Key mods: +3 to Sorceress Skills, +20% FCR, +15-30% Cold Skill Damage, -20% to Enemy Cold Resistance, All Resistances +25-40. Best weapon for cold Sorceress builds (Blizzard/FO) due to cold pierce + damage amplification.

Trang-Oul's Claws is a Unique Heavy Bracers (part of Trang-Oul's Avatar set). qlvl: 45. Key mods: +20% FCR, +30% Cold Resist, +30 Mana, +2 to Curses (Necromancer). Even standalone (not part of full set), it provides +2 Curses and FCR, making it best-in-slot gloves for many Necromancer builds.

Tal Rasha's Adjudication is the amulet for the Tal Rasha set. Key mods: +2 to Sorceress Skills, +20% FCR, +33% Lightning Resistance, +65 to Life, +10% to Maximum Mana. As part of the 3-piece set partial bonus: +65 Mana, Lightning Resist. Full Tal Rasha set gives massive Sorceress bonuses. qlvl: 77.
Dwarf Star is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +40 to Life, +50% Fire Absorb, 15% Damage Taken Goes to Mana, +100 to Attack Rating. Best fire absorb ring in game. qlvl: 45.
Raven Frost is a Unique Ring. Key mods: Cannot be Frozen, +15-45 to Dexterity, +150-250 to Attack Rating, +15-20% to Cold Skill Damage, Cold Absorb 20%. Essential ring for Cannot Be Frozen. qlvl: 45.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.

Highlord's Wrath is a Unique Amulet. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +20% Increased Attack Speed, +33% Lightning Resistance, +1 to Deadly Strike per Character Level (cap 99%), 35% Chance of Deadly Strike. qlvl: 65. Best physical melee amulet for Deadly Strike builds (Hammerdin excluded).

Wisp Projector unique ring. Charges: Level 6 Faerie Fire (11 charges), Level 9 Heart of Wolverine (11 charges), Level 16 Spirit of Barbs (11 charges). +10-20% Lightning Absorb. +20% Faster Hit Recovery. +10-20% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items. +3 to Mana after each Kill. One of the most popular rings for solo MF builds due to combined absorb + MF. Sought after for Lightning-immune areas. qlvl=84, drops in late Hell areas.

String of Ears unique Demonhide Sash (Elite belt). 6-8% Life Stolen per Hit. Physical Damage Reduced by 10-15%. Magic Damage Reduced by 10-15. +25% Enhanced Defense. +15 Defense. Excellent survivability belt for melee builds. Physical/Magic DR make it very tanky. Compare with Verdungo's (more life, less DR). qlvl=76. Drops in late NM to early Hell.

Magefist unique Light Gauntlets. +1 to Fire Skills. +20% Faster Cast Rate. Regenerate Mana 25%. +20% Enhanced Defense. +5 Fire Absorb. Key FCR gloves for Fire Sorceress builds. The +1 Fire skills + 20% FCR makes it best-in-slot gloves for Fire Sorc. Also used by Hammerdin and other caster builds needing FCR. qlvl=39, drops anywhere from mid-game onwards.

Frostburn unique Gauntlets. +40% Enhanced Defense. Adds 1-6 Cold Damage. +10-20% to Maximum Mana. Very popular mana-boosting gloves for caster builds that stack mana (e.g., Energy Shield Sorceress, Chain Lightning Sorc). Combined with high Mana pool gear, the % mana boost is significant. qlvl=29.

Gore Rider unique War Boots. 30% Faster Run/Walk. 10% Chance of Open Wounds. 15% Deadly Strike. 10% Chance of Crushing Blow. +20% Enhanced Defense. Requirements: 94 Str. BiS boots for most melee builds due to triple deadly-strike/crushing-blow/open-wounds combo. Preferred over War Traveler for physical damage dealers. qlvl=47, drops mid-late game.

Peasant Crown unique War Hat. +20% Faster Run/Walk. +1 to All Skills. +20% Enhanced Defense. Replenish Life +6. 100% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). Vitality +15. Energy +15. Popular budget MF helm due to +1 All Skills + 100 MF combo. Excellent early MF option before finding Shako. qlvl=29. No strength requirement (12 Str).

Twitchthroe unique Studded Leather. +20% Increased Attack Speed. +25% Faster Hit Recovery. +20% Enhanced Defense. 25% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). Dexterity +10. Strength +10. Cannot Be Frozen (implicit from FHR). Popular for MF runs due to 25 MF + FHR + IAS combo. Used by melee MF builds (Zealer, Barb). Very low str/dex requirement — easy to use at low levels. qlvl=16.

Doombringer unique Champion Sword. 8% Chance to Cast Level 6 Weaken on Striking. 2-6 Knockback. +160-210% Enhanced Damage. Ignore Target Defense. -25% to Monster Defense per Hit. Adds 12-45 Damage. +25% Deadly Strike. +1 to Light Radius. One of the highest single-target physical DPS swords. Good for Frenzy Barb or Whirlwind builds wanting ignore target defense. Str req: 163. qlvl=60, elite drop areas.

Arreat's Face unique Slayer Guard (Barbarian-only). +2 to Barbarian Skill Levels. 20% Bonus to Attack Rating. +150-200% Enhanced Defense. All Resistances +30. Adds 30-70 Damage. +30% Faster Hit Recovery. 3% Life stolen per hit. Required Level: 70. Str req: 118. BiS helmet for almost all Barbarian builds. The +2 All Barb Skills + 30 All Res + FHR makes it irreplaceable. Often socketed with Cham (Cannot Be Frozen) or 15/15 jewel.

Baranar's Star is a Unique Devil Star (Morning Star). One-Hand Damage 38-105. +75-100% Enhanced Damage. Adds 211-397 Fire Damage. Adds 17-62 Lightning Damage. Adds 17-62 Cold Damage. +20% Increased Attack Speed. +20% Deadly Strike. +2 to Mace Mastery (Barbarian Only). 25% Open Wounds. Str req: 53, qlvl=59 (elite). A Barbarian Frenzy weapon option that delivers all three elemental dmg types.

The Grandfather is a Unique Colossus Blade. Two-Hand Damage: 46-337. +150-200% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. Adds 5-30 Fire Damage. +20% Increased Attack Speed. +35% Deadly Strike. +10 to Strength. +10 to Dexterity. +10 to Vitality. +20 to Maximum Damage. All Resistances +10. Str req: 189. qlvl=85 (elite, TC87). A top-tier two-handed sword for physical damage builds (Whirlwind Barb, Berserk). High str requirement.

Thunderstroke is a Unique Matriarchal Javelin. Throw Damage: 40-155, One-Hand Damage: 40-62. +150-200% Enhanced Damage. +1-3 to Lightning Fury (Amazon). +1-3 to Lightning Strike (Amazon). Adds 1-507 Lightning Damage. -25% to Enemy Lightning Resistance. +2 to Amazon Skill Levels. 20% Bonus to Attack Rating. Dex req: 142, qlvl=85. Best-in-slot weapon for Lightning Fury Amazon in endgame. The enemy LR reduction stacks with Conviction.

Blackbog's Sharp is a Unique Cinquedeas (dagger). One-Hand Damage: 15-43. +120-150% Enhanced Damage. Adds 100-220 Poison Damage over 2 seconds. +2 to Poison and Bone Skills (Necromancer). +3 to Poison Dagger (Necromancer). Hit Causes Monster to Flee 50%. -50% to Enemy Poison Resistance. +3 to Poison Explosion (Necromancer). +3 to Poison Nova (Necromancer). Str req: 25. qlvl=45. Popular Necromancer Poison Nova weapon for reducing enemy poison resistance by 50%.

Manald Heal is a Unique Coral Ring. +20% Faster Run/Walk. Replenish Life +5-8. +20% to Maximum Mana. Regenerate Mana 20%. +5 to Strength. qlvl: 22. Popular early/mid game ring for casters (mana regen). In Basin, also used in niche Javazon or Sorceress builds due to the mana sustain. Low strength and qlvl requirements make it accessible untwinked.

Metalgrid is a Unique Amulet (linked rings/chain type). +3-5 to Combat Skills, +25-35 to Strength, +25-35 to Vitality, All Resistances +50-80. qlvl: 88. One of the strongest resistance amulets in the game. Extremely hard to find (qlvl 88). Used when resistance is the biggest concern; competes with Mara's Kaleidoscope but offers no skill levels. Source: Act 5 late-game monsters.

Cat's Eye is a Unique Amulet. +20% Faster Run/Walk. +30% Increased Attack Speed. +100 Defense. +25 to Dexterity. +100 Defense vs. Missiles. qlvl: 50. Best-in-slot amulet for physical Amazon (Bowazon) and many melee characters needing attack speed and run/walk. No elemental resists or skill levels, but the IAS and FRW bonuses are unmatched for Bow Amazons.

Crescent Moon is a Unique Amulet (common name used for both ring and ammy entries). For the Rare Rune Word Crescent Moon see runewords. The unique Crescent Moon Amulet: +10% Faster Cast Rate, Level 18 Telekinesis (30 charges), Level 13 Attract (3 charges), +45 to Mana, Magic Damage Reduced by 10, +2 to Mana After Each Kill. qlvl: 46. Handy for casters who need the mana boost and attract charges for crowd control. Not the most commonly sought ammy but has niche use.

Nature's Peace is a Unique Jade Ring. Slain Monsters Rest in Peace (monsters cannot be revived or resurrected). Poison Length Reduced by 75%. Poison Damage Reduced by 15. Damage Reduced by 7-11. Level 5 Oak Sage (27 charges). qlvl: 69. Situationally important — the 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' mod prevents Necromancer revive, Shamans resurrecting, and related mechanics. Often worn in specific content or when facing revive-heavy enemy packs.

Schaefer's Hammer is a Unique Legendary Mallet. Two-Hand Damage: 131-302. +280-320% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. 15% Chance to Cast Level 10 Static Field when Struck. Adds 166-606 Lightning Damage. Slain Monsters Rest in Peace. +100% Lightning Skill Damage. 10% Life Stolen per Hit. +3 to Light Radius. qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87 drop). Premier weapon for Paladin Lightning-themed builds. The '+100% Lightning Skill Damage' is a global bonus to all Lightning-based skills.

Azurewrath is a Unique Phase Blade. One-Hand Damage: 150-255. +230-270% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. Sanctuary Aura Level 10-13 (Phase Blade version). Adds 250-500 Magic Damage. 33% Deadly Strike. +50% Enhanced Defense. +6 Strength. Indestructible (Phase Blade base). qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87). Interesting for solo-aura Sanctuary builds, provides built-in Sanctuary aura to break Physical Immune skeletons and undead. Phase Blade base means no repairs needed.

Death Cleaver is a Unique Berserker Axe. Two-Hand Damage: 151-298. +200-240% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. 66% Deadly Strike. 50% Chance of Crushing Blow. -33% Target Defense. 7% Life Stolen per Hit. +30% Increased Attack Speed. qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87). Extremely high Deadly Strike (66%) and Crushing Blow (50%) combo makes it powerful for physical damage builds. Berserker Axe base with high IAS. Often used in Whirlwind Barbarian or Berserk builds.

Stormshield is a Unique Monarch. Defense: 136-165 (upgraded). Chance to Block: Class-dependent. +3,771 Defense vs. Missile. +30 to Strength. Lightning Resist +60%. Cold Resist +35%. Damage Reduced by 35%. +25% Faster Block Rate. 25% Chance to Block (Paladin 34%). Indestructible. qlvl: 73 (elite). Best-in-slot shield for most melee builds due to 35% Physical Damage Reduction and the 60% Lightning Resist. Combined with Verdungo's, can cap PDR at 50% (game cap). Monarch base allows 4 sockets when white (Spirit Runeword popular alt).

Herald of Zakarum is a Unique Gilded Shield. Defense: 434-541. Chance to Block: Class-dependent (+30% base). +180-220% Enhanced Defense. +30% Faster Block Rate. +2 to Paladin Skill Levels. +2 to Combat Skills (Paladin Only). 20% Increased Chance of Blocking. +20 to Strength. +20 to Vitality. All Resistances +50%. qlvl: 73 (elite). Best-in-slot shield for Smiter / Hammerdin / BvC Paladin builds. Provides +4 total Paladin skill levels, massive all-res, and high block. Gilded Shield base has elite inherent blocking chance.

Waterwalks are Unique Sharkskin Boots. Defense: 102-116. +40-50% Enhanced Defense. 15-25% Faster Run/Walk. +15% Fire Resist. +5% Chance to Dodge (Amazon only, from quiver slot obsolete in D2R — note: boots only). +45 to Life. +15 to Dexterity. +2 to Maximum Fire Resist. 20% Faster Hit Recovery. qlvl: 65 (elite). Popular boots for Amazons and other builds needing Life + Dex + FRW. The Dex bonus helps bowzon to-hit. Good budget alternative to Sandstorm Trek for characters needing Strength/Dex scaling.

Skullder's Ire is a Unique Russet Armor. Defense: 459-524. +1 to All Skills. Magic Find: 1% per character level (up to 99% at level 99). +10-15 to Energy. Repairs Durability 1 per 20 Seconds. +100-150% Enhanced Defense. qlvl: 61 (exceptional). Premier magic-find body armor. At level 90+ provides 90%+ MF from a single armor slot. Preferred for MF builds that run Mephisto, Andariel, and Countess. The auto-repair removes need for repairs mid-run.
